title: DCSO SIAHA DISTRICT-IN MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA LEH NGENNA THU A CHHUAH
content:
4852/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 16 March, 2026 :A hnuaia mi ang hian Pu M. Vanlalduata, District Civil Supply Officer Siaha District, Siaha chuan MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA LEH NGENNA a chhuah.

MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA LEH NGENNA

Kan hriat angin US, ISRAEL leh IRAN buaina avanga eirawngbawlna gas, diesel leh petrol-ah harsatna kan tawh loh nan central leh state level-ah sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah reng a. Mipuite chiai lo turin kan inngenin kan inhriattir a ni.

1. Mamawh lem lova LPG/eirawngbawlna gas booking siam kan awm mai loh nan Ni 25 capping siam a ni a. Vawiin angah eirawngbawlna gas i book chuan Ni 25 hnuah booking i siam leh thei dawn chauh a ni. Hei hi chiâi avanga gas booking a awm loh nana tih a ni.

2. Harsatna kan tawh loh nan eirawngbawlna gas renchem taka hmang turin kan inngen bawk a ni.

3. LPG/eirawngbawlna gas zawrh chhawn/black marketing leh chheprelh/hoarding hi danin a khap tlat a ni. Hetianga inhnamhnawih kan hriat chuan thuneitute hnenah report turin kan inngen bawk nise.

4. Diesel leh petrol hi thuneituten phalna an pek a nih loh chuan bur/gallon/barrel a lak chhawn phal a ni lo a. Hei hi mipuite him nan/safety a tih a ni a. Chuvangin, bur/gallon/barrel a lak tum lo turin mipuite kan ngen nghal nise.

5. Tun dinhmunah LPG (gas), Diesel leh petrol-ah harsatna emaw tlakchhamna a awm rih lova. Central leh state sawrkarin theihtawp an chhuah mek reng a. Chutih laiin tunlai boruak avanga harsatna kan tawh loh nan mipuiten kan gas, petrol leh diesel kawl laite renchem taka hmang turin kan inngen in kan inhriattir nawn a ni.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL KHAWPUI CHEI THARNA LUNGPHUN (LAMMUAL MASTER PLAN - EARLY BIRD PROJECT) CHIEF MINISTER HOVA NEIH A NI
content:
4851/2025-2026

Aizawl the 17th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Assam Rifles chhuahsan ram Heritage Court tlangah Aizawl khawpui chei tharna hnathawh bul tanna lungphun Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoman a hawng a. UD & PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga bakah, Speaker, Minister leh MLA eng emaw zat an tel.

Thu sawiin Chief Minister chuan, he ram hman dan tur reltu Advisory Committee hi mipui huapzo pawl hrang hrangte telna a ni a, a thu tlukna hi sorkar thutlukna bik a ni lova mipui thutlukna zawk a ni. A ram hman dan tur rawtna hi kan dawng hnem hle a, tuna mi ang hian kan pawm ta a ni. Rawtna dang dawn belh kan tum tawh lova, tuna mi hi kan thutlukna tawp, ding reng tawh tur a ni. Mandir sawnna hi dap a ngai a. Hmun hma remchang a awm theih nan Pathian hnenah i dil ang u.

Bazar Bungkawna mimal leh pawlten ram an neih, Aizawl Square atana siam tura tiha ram neitute be turin palai kan tir dawn a. Kan ram tan a ni tih hriaa rilru inhawng taka lo dawr turin ram neitute ka ngen a ni.

Aizawl khawpui laili hi hmun mawi tak, naupangte tana lenna nuam, thalaite tana hmun tha, pitar leh putarte tan pawha hawi khawthawnna hmun remchang taka chantir kan tum a. Kan zavaia tan a ni tih hriain mitinin inhawng takin he hnathawh hi i thawhpui ang u. A thawktute pawhin a hlawkna lam chauh ngaihtuah lovin kan ram tan a ni tih hriain thahnemngai takin lo thawk se kan duh a ni, a ti.

Pu K. Sapdanga, UD & PA Minister pawhin thusawiin, tukinah hian hmasawnna project pakhat kan thawk dawn a ni satliah lova, kan ramin Pathian malsawmna ropui tak a dawn kan lawm tel a ni. UT inthlan hmasa berah khan Aizawl laili atanga Assam Rifle sawn chhuah hi sawi rik a lo ni tawh a, an chhuahsan theih nan hian party tinten hma kan la vek a. Vawiina sorkar hi kan vannei a, kan hunah a takin a lo thleng ta a ni. Kan zaa kan lawmna tur a ni a, lungrualna min thlentu ni nghal se a duhawm hle, a ti.

Hna bul tanna inkhawm hi Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau, Commissioner & Secretary, UD & PA chuan a kaihruai a, Rev. R. Lalbiakliana, President, Council of Churches in Mizoram chuan hunserh a hmang a, Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director, UD & PA leh Member Secretary, Joint Steering Committee chuan report tlangpui a pe a ni.

AR ram chei thatna tur Master Plan hi UD & PA chuan a duang a, ruahmanna an siamte chu Advisory Committee hmaah chhawp chhuah niin a tul angin an siam tha a. Advisory Committee-in a pawm tawh te bawhzuitu tur Steering Committee an awm leh a ni. Advisory Committee meeting neihte Press Release hi I&PR website-ah dahchhuah zel thin an ni.

Ruahmanna tlangpuiah chuan Saron Veng, BCM Biak In atanga intanin chhuah lamah kawngpui laih tur a ni a, Dak Inpui bulah a chhuak ang. Kawngpui thar sial leh kawngpui awmsa chei nan Rs. 23 Cr dah niin sanction pawh hmuh tawh a ni a. PWD ten an thawk ang.

Bazar Bungkawn atanga intanin Aizawl Square, mawi tak sak tur a ni.

Aizawl Square thlangah hian Police Outpost dah tura ruahman a ni.

Saron atanga Dak Inpui inpawhna kawngpui kiang hmun remchangah Aizawl khawpui laili chawmtu tur Power Sub Station bun tur a ni.

Lammual sir hmar lamah hian Vanapa Hall, mi 2000 leng, hall leh Auditorium dang nei tel, lirthei tam tham tak dahna nei sak tur a ni a. Architectural Design hi inelna hmanga neih tur a ni a. Vawiin atangin registration tih theih nghal a ni ang. May ni 29 khian intihsiakna result puan hman tum a ni.

Vanapa Hall thar tur dawt chiah chhim lam tlang, Lammual thlir theihna remchang ni bawkah hian Tuizem lian dah tur a ni a. Mawi taka chei a, mipui thutna tur tam tak siam nghal tur a ni.

Canteen kualah hian park nuam tak sak tur a ni.

Vanapa Hall thar leh Tuizem dahna tur inkarah hian Public Park sak a ni ang.

Open Amphitheatre hi Dak inpui hnaih, kawngpui thar kiangah dah a ni ang a. Multi Level Car Parking a awm bawk ang. Kawngpui thar hmun tha laiah khaw thlirna sak tur a ni.

Hmun zau tak hi Green Zone leh Walking Trails atan dah a ni.

Heritage Court, Vanapa Hall ep tlang hi chei that tur a ni a, building pariat chei that a, a thenkhat dang thiah tur a ni a. Sak belh pawh a awm bawk ang. Hmun mawi taka siam a ni dawn a, Rs. 13 Cr sengin PWD in hma a la dawn a ni. Hna bul tan mai turin khawl pawh an chhawp tawh a ni.

March ni 15, 2025 khan Assam Rifle ram hi official-a Mizoram sorkara hlanna neih a ni a. A kum khatna chamah a chei tharna hna kutthlak tanna neih a ni dawn ta a ni.
